documents.name: Apple Media Services Terms and Conditions

points.title: The service is provided 'as is' and to be used at the users' sole risk

case.title: The service is provided 'as is' and to be used at your sole risk
case.description: This service does not provide any guarantees as to its usability or fitness for the users' purposes. Users agree to use it at their own risk, accepting any possible bugs, malfunctions or harm to their devices.

points.title: The service has non-exclusive use of your content

case.title: The service has non-exclusive use of your content
case.description: The service can pay for your content and you are allowed to make it commercially available to other services/parties.

points.title: Content you post may be edited by the service for any reason

case.title: Content you post may be edited by the service for any reason
case.description: This service can edit any content on the service for whatever the reason and at their sole discretion.

points.title: They may stop providing the service at any time

case.title: They may stop providing the service at any time
case.description: They may discontinue the services without prior notice, at any time, for any or no reason. They usually assume no liability for losses and damages resulting from this suspension.

points.title: Terms may be changed any time at their discretion, without notice to you

case.title: Terms may be changed any time at their discretion, without notice to you
case.description: The Agreements can be updated at any time, including in a way that negatively affects user rights, without notifying before or after the changes.

points.title: This service is only available for use individually and non-commercially.

case.title: This service is only available for use individually and non-commercially
case.description: Users can't use the Service for commercial purposes (unless the Service consents): it is only for personal, individual purposes.

points.title: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for the activities on your account

case.title: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for the activities on your account
case.description: You are responsible for protecting the confidentiality of your password and for maintaining the security of your account. Any activity occurring under your account is your responsibility, whether authorized by you or not.

points.title: The service will only respond to government requests that are reasonable

case.title: The service will only respond to government requests that are reasonable
case.description: The Agreement explains they will disclose personal data about you if it is reasonably necessary to comply with applicable law and government requests.

points.title: You agree not to submit libelous, harassing or threatening content

case.title: You agree not to submit libelous, harassing or threatening content
case.description: This service prohibits users from submitting content of a variety of types. This can include content that is unlawful, harassing, abusive, threatening, libelous, sexist, racist, homophobic, transphobic, or discriminatory in any other way.

points.title: You are prohibited from sending chain letters, junk mail, spam or any unsolicited messages

case.title: You are prohibited from sending chain letters, junk mail, spam or any unsolicited messages
case.description: Users are not allowed to use the service for chain letters, junk mail, spamming or any other distribution of content to people who have not agreed to receiving it.

points.title: You are tracked via web beacons, tracking pixels, browser fingerprinting, and/or device fingerprinting

case.title: You are tracked via web beacons, tracking pixels, browser fingerprinting, and/or device fingerprinting
case.description: Tracking technologies (such as web beacons, tracking pixels...) are employed on users and/or the service assigns a unique ID to a browser or device to track its behaviour.

points.title: Your personal data will not be used for an automated decision-making

case.title: Your personal data will not be used for an automated decision-making
case.description: The service promises not to use your personal data for automated decision-making, including profiling.

points.title: Information is provided about security practices

case.title: Information is provided about security practices
case.description: It's important to know what security measures are taken to protect your data from unauthorized access. This case applies to the Agreements that precisely explain their security practices.

points.title: Your personal data may be sold or otherwise transferred as part of a bankruptcy proceeding or other type of financial transaction

case.title: Your personal data may be sold or otherwise transferred as part of a bankruptcy proceeding or other type of financial transaction
case.description: If the service gets acquired or is involved in a merger, bankruptcy, reorganisation or sale, your personal data may be transferred or sold.

points.title: Your personal data is not sold

case.title: Your personal data is not sold
case.description: This service makes an explicit promise not to sell "personal data" of users.

points.title: A complaint mechanism is provided for the handling of personal data

case.title: A complaint mechanism is provided for the handling of personal data
case.description: The service provides users with contact information for an internal or external structure to lodge complaints. It also provides users with contact information for a higher data protection / privacy office in case the internal mechanism fails to satisfy the user.

points.title: You can retrieve an archive of your data

case.title: You can retrieve an archive of your data
case.description: Users can request a copy of the data collected through the services and infer from it the amount of personal information that is processed and stored by the Service. This usually applies to Services GDPR compliants.

points.title: When the service wants to change its terms, you are notified a week or more in advance.

case.title: When the service wants to change its terms, you are notified a week or more in advance
case.description: Users will be notified a week before the Terms are somehow updated, which lets them a reasonable amount of time to carefully read the changes and perhaps stop using the services if they do not longer agree.

points.title: Tracking pixels are used in service-to-user communication

case.title: Tracking pixels are used in service-to-user communication
case.description: The service tracks the user count or some actions of the user; this is usually used for statistics. For example, emails sent by a service can contain a pixel tag, which is a small, clear image that can tell them whether or not you have opened an email and what your IP address is.

points.title: The service suspends your account after inactivity for a certain or uncertain time

case.title: The service suspends your account after inactivity for a certain or uncertain time

points.title: You can retrieve an archive of your data

case.title: You can retrieve an archive of your data
case.description: Users can request a copy of the data collected through the services and infer from it the amount of personal information that is processed and stored by the Service. This usually applies to Services GDPR compliants.

points.title: Specific content can be deleted without reason and may be removed without prior notice

case.title: Specific content can be deleted without reason and may be removed without prior notice
case.description: This service can delete specific content. Usually they will claim they reserve the right to do it at their sole discretion, which is legalese for saying they won't give a specific reason. If the terms say they will not notify you, it shall be included in the quote but if it does not explicitly say they will give you a notice, it can be reasonably inferred that they can do it without telling you.

points.title: There is a date of the last update of the agreements

case.title: There is a date of the last update of the agreements
case.description: The given text has a date that allows to know when it was last updated.

points.title: The court of law governing the terms is in a jurisdiction that is friendlier to user privacy protection.

case.title: The court of law governing the terms is in a jurisdiction that is friendlier to user privacy protection
case.description: The Terms are governed by the applicable laws of a jurisdiction known for protecting citizens privacy with strong data regulations. Usually contributors will need to explain in the Analysis view of each point linked to this Case why the jurisdiction is friendly to user privacy protection.

points.title: The service is not responsible for linked or (clearly) quoted content from third-party content providers

case.title: The service is not responsible for linked or (clearly) quoted content from third-party content providers

points.title: You agree not to use the service for illegal purposes

case.title: You agree not to use the service for illegal purposes
case.description: The user agrees not to commit any unlawful acts through the use of the website, including the posting of illegal content or messaging.

points.title: The service assumes no liability for any damages the user incurs

case.title: The service assumes no liability for any damages the user incurs
case.description: The service assumes no liability for any damages the user incurs, including tangible (e.g. profits) and intangible losses (e.g. data), resulting from the use or inability to use the service or any other matter relating to the service.

points.title: Invalidity of any portion of the Terms of Service does not entail invalidity of its remainder

case.title: Invalidity of any portion of the Terms of Service does not entail invalidity of its remainder
case.description: Should any portion of the Terms of Service be unenforceable or invalid, that portion will be enforced to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law and the remainder of the TOS will remain valid and enforceable.

points.title: Failure to enforce any provision of the Terms of Service does not constitute a waiver of such provision

case.title: Failure to enforce any provision of the Terms of Service does not constitute a waiver of such provision
case.description: Even if the service does not or not always enforce all of the rules or provisions contained in its terms, they still apply. Users can at a later time still be held accountable for violating provisions that have not been enforced consistently.

points.title: The posting of pornographic content is prohibited

case.title: The posting of pornographic content is prohibited
case.description: Users are not allowed to post any content of pornographic nature. This includes adult content, things that are sexually explicit, or obscene.

points.title: The service has non-exclusive use of your content

case.title: The service has non-exclusive use of your content
case.description: The service can pay for your content and you are allowed to make it commercially available to other services/parties.

points.title: Extra data may be collected about you through promotions

case.title: Extra data may be collected about you through promotions
case.description: Additional personal data may be collected through contests, surveys, promotions, petitions or sweepstakes.

points.title: This service shares your personal data with third parties that are not essential to its operation

case.title: This service shares your personal data with third parties that are not essential to its operation
case.description: Your personal data is or may be given to third parties nonessential to the service’s operation. This could be a business partner that receives your data to provide targeted advertisements.

points.title: This service gives your personal data to third parties involved in its operation

case.title: This service gives your personal data to third parties involved in its operation
case.description: Your personal data is or may be given to third parties essential to the service’s operation. This could be an external spam detection service for an internet forum.

points.title: Your data may be processed and stored anywhere in the world

case.title: Your data may be processed and stored anywhere in the world
case.description: Your data is stored all over the world, including in countries where data protection rules may differ from the ones of the service's jurisdiction or those of your country jurisdiction.

points.title: Your personal data may be disclosed to comply with government requests without notice to you

case.title: Your personal data may be disclosed to comply with government requests without notice to you
case.description: If the Government governing the Terms requests personal data of a user of this service, they may not inform/notify the user while complying with the request.

points.title: Third parties are involved in operating the service

case.title: Third parties are involved in operating the service

points.title: The service informs you that its privacy policy does not apply to third party websites

case.title: This service informs you that its Privacy Policy does not apply to third-party services
case.description: The service states that whenever it links to third party websites or applications, its privacy policy does not apply. Those third party websites or applications hosted or operated by other organizations may have their own privacy policies.

points.title: Third-party cookies are used for statistics

case.title: Third-party cookies are used for statistics
case.description: For instance, Google Analytics, rather than self-hosted (first-party) statistics software.

points.title: Your profile is combined across various products

case.title: Your profile is combined across various products
case.description: When using multiple services from one same company, they can combine these (unrelated) information sources about you to build up a single richer user profile about you.

points.title: Many different types of personal data are collected

case.title: Many different types of personal data are collected
case.description: The service collects different kinds of personal data, such as name, demographic information, postal address, biometric data, device information, IDs, contacts, call logs...

points.title: Information is gathered about you through third parties

case.title: Information is gathered about you through third parties
case.description: This Service may employ, either identifiable or non-identifiable, data collection from third party sources about you.

points.title: The service gives 30 days of notice before closing your account

case.title: 30 days of notice are given before closing your account
case.description: The Terms explain they will notify users at least 30 days before closing their accounts, which allows users to limit the losses and damages caused by this termination.

points.title: You maintain ownership of your content

case.title: You maintain ownership of your content
case.description: This service does not claim ownership over user-generated content or materials, and the user doesn't need to waive any moral rights by posting owned content.

points.title: The service provider makes no warranty regarding uninterrupted, timely, secure or error-free service

case.title: The service provider makes no warranty regarding uninterrupted, timely, secure or error-free service
case.description: The service provider expressly does not claim to provide uninterrupted, timely, secure or error-free service.

points.title: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold the service harmless in case of a claim related to your use of the service

case.title: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold the service harmless in case of a claim related to your use of the service

points.title: This service assumes no responsibility and liability for the contents of links to other websites

case.title: This service assumes no responsibility and liability for the contents of links to other websites
case.description: The service rejects any responsibility for the contents of other websites to which it links.

points.title: The service claims to be CCPA compliant for California users

case.title: The service claims to be CCPA compliant for California users
case.description: The service has a different behavior towards users protected by the California Consumer Privacy Act.

points.title: A complaint mechanism is provided for the handling of personal data

case.title: A complaint mechanism is provided for the handling of personal data
case.description: The service provides users with contact information for an internal or external structure to lodge complaints. It also provides users with contact information for a higher data protection / privacy office in case the internal mechanism fails to satisfy the user.

points.title: User accounts can be terminated after having been in breach of the terms of service repeatedly

case.title: User accounts can be terminated after having been in breach of the Terms of Service repeatedly
case.description: User accounts can be terminated for having been in breach of the terms of service repeatedly, meaning they cannot be terminated without a reason, but only for a limited number of reasons. Additionally, user accounts will not be deleted after a first infringement.

points.title: Two factor authentication is provided for your account

case.title: Two factor authentication is provided for your account
case.description: The service provides means of further securing your account with two factor authentification, thus greatly improving account security.

points.title: The data retention period is kept to the minimum necessary for fulfilling its purposes

case.title: The data retention period is kept to the minimum necessary for fulfilling its purposes
case.description: The service will remove personal data from its systems once it is no longer required. Depending on the type of information and the reason it was collected, data retention periods will vary.

points.title: Third parties used by the service are bound by confidentiality obligations

case.title: Third parties used by the service are bound by confidentiality obligations
case.description: The Third Parties accessing your personal information must keep it confidential and only use it for limited purposes.

points.title: Information is provided about how your personal data is used

case.title: Information is provided about how your personal data is used
case.description: The Privacy Policy explains the purposes for which data is collected and the way it is processed, used and shared.

points.title: Blocking first party cookies may limit your ability to use the service

case.title: Blocking first-party cookies may limit your ability to use the service
case.description: Most browsers allow users to set preferences related to cookies storage. You may choose to block all cookies (including first-party cookies), but it may impact your use of this service and you may not be able to access some or any of the features provided.

points.title: You agree to indemnify and hold the service harmless in case of a claim related to your use of the service

case.title: You agree to indemnify and hold the service harmless in case of a claim related to your use of the service
case.description:
You are responsible for your use of the service. If a claim arises related to that use, you agree to indemnify and hold the service harmless.
If users are also required to defend the service, see Case 146 instead.

points.title: Defend, indemnify, hold harmless; survives termination

case.title: Defend, indemnify, hold harmless; survives termination

points.title: Instead of asking directly, this Service will assume your consent to changes of terms merely from your usage.

case.title: Instead of asking directly, this Service will assume your consent to changes of terms merely from your usage
case.description: The Service infers your acceptance from your continued usage, instead of prompting you to read the new Terms and asking for direct consent. This doesn’t apply to services that have no way to seek consent from users through their contact details or an account.

points.title: You can request access, correction and/or deletion of your data

case.title: You can request access, correction and/or deletion of your data
case.description: Users have the right to access personal data hold by the Service, correct it and/or permanently delete it. This usually applies to Services GDPR compliants.

points.title: Terms may be changed any time at their discretion, without notice to you

case.title: Terms may be changed any time at their discretion, without notice to you
case.description: The Agreements can be updated at any time, including in a way that negatively affects user rights, without notifying before or after the changes.
